pi_items.source: IATA official airline list, Wikipedia list of airline codes, and Airhex airline directory all confirm Delta Air Lines uses the IATA code 'DL'

pi_items.verified_value: Keywords are appropriate for app functionality: Flight Crew View official website confirms the app provides 'Notifications throughout your duty day to keep you updated on gate changes, delayed flights' (supports track, alert, notify) and 'Friends and Family Sharing' features (supports follow, watching)
pi_items.source: FlightCrewView.com official website features documentation confirms notification and schedule sharing capabilities
Google Play Store and Apple App Store list Flight Crew View as available with package identifier com.robert.fcView, used by over 40,000 flight crews

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView), a real aviation app available on Google Play Store and App Store used by over 40,000 flight crews worldwide. The task requires searching for DL400, a real Delta Air Lines flight that operates daily from San Francisco to Boston. Delta Air Lines uses the IATA code 'DL'. The app supports flight tracking notifications and schedule sharing features that align with the task's tracking and alert keywords.
